title: Pakistani national among 3 arrested in US for attempting to smuggle 89 firearms into Canada
summary_full: Three men, including a Pakistani national, face serious charges in the US for attempting to smuggle 89 firearms, many reportedly stolen, into Canada.  Authorities apprehended the trio during a traffic stop, uncovering a significant cache of weapons.  The accused are now detained, facing lengthy prison sentences for their alleged involvement in illegal arms trafficking.
